name: 相似图形
subject: math
domain_name: 相似与三角 / Similarity & Trig / Similarity & Trig
curriculum_points: G-SRT.A.2 Given two figures, use the definition of similarity in terms of similarity transformations to decide if they are similar; explain using similarity transformations the meaning of similarity for triangles as the equality of all corresponding pairs of angles and the proportionality of all corresponding pairs of sides.
G-SRT.A.3 Use the properties of similarity transformations to establish the AA criterion for two triangles to be similar.
